summary.original: Expert guidance for Geist, Vercel's default typography system and font family for precise Next.js interfaces. Use when configuring Geist Sans, Geist Mono, or Geist Pixel, setting up font imports, or applying Vercel typography and aesthetic guidance.
summary.zhCN: Geist 专家指南。Geist 是 Vercel 为精确的 Next.js 界面提供的默认字体排版系统和字体家族。用于配置 Geist Sans、Geist Mono 或 Geist Pixel，设置字体导入，或应用 Vercel 字体排版与美学指南。

description.original: Expert guidance for Geist, Vercel's default typography system and font family for precise Next.js interfaces. Use when configuring Geist Sans, Geist Mono, or Geist Pixel, setting up font imports, or applying Vercel typography and aesthetic guidance. Agent-OPT preserves the fixed official bundle and adapts it for a dedicated bilingual SkillWorkspace workflow with ranked guidance, full-text search, and sandboxed supporting-file previews. Commands and external services described by the upstream guidance are not executed by this read-only adapter.
description.zhCN: Geist 专家指南。Geist 是 Vercel 为精确的 Next.js 界面提供的默认字体排版系统和字体家族。用于配置 Geist Sans、Geist Mono 或 Geist Pixel，设置字体导入，或应用 Vercel 字体排版与美学指南。 Agent-OPT 保留固定版本的官方完整资源包，并将其适配为能力专属的双语 SkillWorkspace 工作流，支持相关章节排序、全文检索和沙箱化支持文件预览；此只读适配器不会执行上游指南中描述的命令或外部服务。

evidence.note: Pinned path-addressed SKILL.md from the official OpenAI plugins repository at commit 11c74d6ba24d3a6d48f54a194cd00ef3beea18f9; exact target byte SHA-256 9df187819184e0ce620b78e2a0af97661075b463ca61d0322569378a93eb9d63.
The fixed parent Vercel plugin manifest names Vercel Labs as author and declares Apache-2.0 for the packaged skills.

license.evidence: Primary-source Apache-2.0 evidence is recorded in the fixed plugins/vercel/.codex-plugin/plugin.json manifest. Agent-OPT redistributes the pinned text bundle for read-only bilingual Web rendering and does not execute upstream implementation code.

name.zhCN: 集成 Geist 字体排版系统

description.original: Choose Geist families and weights, define loading and fallback behavior, map type roles, and verify layout, performance, and multilingual rendering.
description.zhCN: 选择 Geist 字体家族与字重，定义加载和回退行为，映射文字角色，并验证布局、性能与多语言渲染。

description.original: Open the complete pinned skill document in Simplified Chinese or its original language.
description.zhCN: 以完整简体中文译文或原文打开固定版本的技能文档。

description.original: Run keyword search across the selected skill body and return line-level excerpts.
description.zhCN: 在所选技能正文中执行关键词搜索，并返回行级摘录。

description.original: Inspect the heading outline and open one structured section at a time.
description.zhCN: 查看标题大纲，并一次打开一个结构化章节。

name.zhCN: 浏览固定版本支持资源

description.original: List and safely preview the text resources captured from the exact upstream skill directory and recorded in BUNDLE.json.
description.zhCN: 列出并安全预览从精确上游技能目录固定、且记录在 BUNDLE.json 中的文本资源。

notes: The in-process adapter reads only curated files under catalog/skill-bodies/skill-geist.
Supporting-resource previews are limited to BUNDLE.json fixed-hash paths; traversal, unknown paths, symlinks, binaries, and oversized files are rejected.
No upstream commands, network calls, secrets, or external accounts are executed or accessed by this Web adaptation.
Selected from the official Vercel plugin for a broadly useful, non-trivial development or design workflow that does not require credentials, paid access, regional services, or special hardware.

The complete Simplified Chinese SKILL.md preserves frontmatter, heading hierarchy, fenced code blocks, inline-code tokens, Markdown destinations, and raw URLs; the focused structural validator passed.
Every file from the pinned upstream skill directory is preserved byte-for-byte and recorded with SHA-256 evidence in BUNDLE.json.
The capability-specific Chinese Web profile is merged into the shared SkillWorkspace registry and passed its real Chromium task, bilingual source, supporting-resource and failure workflows.
Lifecycle remains web-ready: the read-only bilingual Web adapter is fully evidenced, while optional upstream commands and downstream implementation outcomes are not claimed as executed.
Complete Simplified Chinese translation reviewed against the pinned original; code blocks, commands, paths, inline tokens, links, URLs, and heading structure are preserved.

features: 待建立的字体排版系统 with two capability-specific examples
框架、品牌与多语言约束 bounded context input
Geist 字体排版规范包 in reference-pack, checklist, agent-prompt, and reference-pack modes
complete Simplified Chinese and original SKILL.md switch
relevance-ranked official sections with outline, search, and full-text reader
fixed-commit supporting-resource browser backed by BUNDLE.json hashes
dedicatedElements: 待建立的字体排版系统 input
框架、品牌与多语言约束 panel
Geist 字体排版规范包 result view
为 Next.js 产品配置 Geist 字体 example chip
修复字体回退与布局偏移 example chip

tests.evidence: skill-geist: pinned BUNDLE hashes and bilingual source, outline, search and asset runtime paths passed in the merged 50-Skill suite.
skill-geist: its dedicated Chinese profile executed skill_prepare with representative objective and context and returned a non-empty task artifact.
skill-geist: invalid locale, empty or oversized objective, unknown fields or sections, traversal and unknown supporting-resource paths were rejected.

runner=playwright; browser=chromium; report=var/test-results/playwright.json; testIds=skills.spec.ts › priority Agent Skill browser workflows › @web-e2e [skill-geist] runs bilingual task, source, asset, and failure workflows; route=/plugins/skill-geist; result=passed
skill-geist: bundle containment and fixed hashes passed; the adapter reads only curated files and grants no network, command, secret or external-account access.

blockers: The shipped bilingual Web adaptation is verified; optional upstream scripts and downstream agent outcomes are outside this adapter and are not claimed as executed.
